summary: Rojgaar MVP full-stack tested. Backend: 35/35 pytest cases pass (100%) covering auth (mocked OTP), workers, jobs CRUD+filters, applications (incl. idempotency), saved-jobs, businesses, partners, meta, and _id exclusion. Frontend: End-to-end worker onboarding flow (splash → role → language → phone → otp → city → industry → skills → experience → work-type → ready → home) works after fixing a backend validation bug. Job detail page, business portal (/business) and partner portal (/partner) all render with seeded data, stat cards, and forms. Found and fixed 1 CRITICAL backend bug: WorkerUpsert.phone was required, causing PATCH /api/workers to 422 from the city/industry/skills onboarding screens.
action_items: Optional: rename business.tsx stat-views testID to stat-profile-views for consistency with naming pattern (not blocking; UI works).
Optional: add testID to Save and Call-to-Apply buttons on /job/[id] (currently rendered visually but not testable via testID). Suggested: testID='job-save-toggle' and testID='job-call-apply'.
Optional: address Expo Image style.resizeMode deprecation warning surfacing from a dependency (warning only, not user code).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend WorkerUpsert had phone as required: this caused 422 on every onboarding PATCH (city, industry, skills, experience, work-type). Fixed by making phone Optional (the update endpoint already excludes phone via `k != 'phone'`).
server.py is ~684 lines — acceptable for MVP but candidate to split into routers/models if it grows.
Mongo _id is correctly excluded with projection {'_id': 0} across all read endpoints (verified).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (worker onboarding + home + job detail + business + partner)

seed_data_creation: Backend seed creates 11 jobs (incl. 'Test Job - Carpenter'), demo business (9999999999/Sharma Construction), demo partner (8888888888) with 4 candidates. Tests added 1 extra job 'TEST_QA Carpenter' and 1 candidate 'TEST_Candidate' via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL via EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (note: env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Worker onboarding requires the WorkerUpsert.phone Optional fix to remain in place; otherwise city→industry transition will 422. Demo accounts auto-login at /business (phone 9999999999) and /partner (phone 8888888888) via mock OTP onmount. Run pytest with: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_rojgaar_api.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`
rca_of_issue: Bug: 422 Unprocessable Entity on PATCH /api/workers/{id} from onboarding screens. Reproduction: complete OTP → on city screen tap Bengaluru → Continue → city screen never advanced and uncaught API error. Root cause: WorkerUpsert pydantic model declared `phone: str` (required), so any PATCH payload without `phone` (which is the case for partial updates from each onboarding step) failed validation. Mitigation applied: changed `phone: str` → `phone: Optional[str] = None` in WorkerUpsert. The update handler already filters out the phone field, so allowing it as optional has no side effects. Verified: full worker onboarding now completes through to /home with jobs visible.
